instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new HealthSummary API to show daily activity rings.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 CanvasAPI to draw a custom shape.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new QuickNote API to add a note from the menu bar.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 HeartRateZones API to display current zone.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new MultiUserProfile API to show active user.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new SpatialAudio API to play a sound at a location.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published Int property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Bool property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Strings to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Ints to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional String property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a hydration level, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite artist, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a battery percentage, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a workout duration, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite show, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected object name, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppFocus API to highlight focused elements.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 CollaborationAPI to invite a user to a session.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppLock API to lock the app with TouchID.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 WaterReminder API to display reminder time.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new ParentalControls API to show blocked channels.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new SceneUnderstanding API to show scene type.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of structs with a String property to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing an Int property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Bool values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of Strings to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Double property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a daily calorie goal, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite song, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a network speed, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a step count, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite movie, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a detected room type, configurable via AppIntent.
